title: T-057 — 07-EXT ACP/readiness closeout report task
prompt:
# T-057 — 07-EXT ACP/readiness closeout report task

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` coverage.md, manifest.json, _validate.py.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Provide the final docs/readiness closeout step for ACP execution.

## Implementation contract
Keep this docs-only task focused on evidence and validation; it should not implement application code.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Produce implementation closeout evidence for 07-EXT after all local tasks, validators and prototype labels pass.
pipeline_inputs.details: This is a non-app docs closeout task for the implementer to update coverage evidence, run validators, and list any deferred P2 exceptions.
acceptance_criteria: Given all 07-EXT tasks are imported or completed, then _validate.py passes and coverage.md has no ❌ GAP rows.
Given P2 items remain gated, then coverage marks them as tasked/gated rather than blockers.
Given closeout is submitted, then changed files, test commands/results, deviations and git status are included.
test_strategy: Run python3 _meta/atomic-tasks/07-planning-ext/_validate.py and JSON parse checks.
Review prototype index/master index label counts.
risk_red_lines: Do not mark P2 gated work as P1 done.
Do not add ACP-owned fields to task JSON.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
